nodes.label: 3X-UI Dark Mode Overview Screenshot
nodes.rationale: Displays the main dashboard of the 3X-UI admin panel, showing system monitoring, Xray service status, and network statistics in a dark theme grid layout.

nodes.label: Dark Mode Grid Dashboard Layout
nodes.rationale: Uses a multi-card grid layout with a persistent left sidebar and top-heavy gauge visualizations, optimized for low-light monitoring.

nodes.label: System Resource Monitoring UI
nodes.rationale: Top row circular progress gauges provide a quick visual glance at the server's hardware utilization (CPU, RAM, Swap, Storage).

nodes.label: Xray Core Management Interface
nodes.rationale: Provides quick controls to manage the Xray service, view its logs, restart it, and see its version and uptime.

nodes.label: Network Traffic Metrics UI
nodes.rationale: Displays real-time upload/download speeds, total data transfer, and active TCP/UDP connections for the Xray core.

nodes.label: Client Management Interface
nodes.rationale: The core functionality shown in the UI, enabling users to add, filter, view, and manage client connections including traffic limits, duration, and associated inbounds.

nodes.label: Client Status Dashboard
nodes.rationale: A top-level summary showing aggregate statistics of clients, allowing quick overview of online, ended, depleting, disabled, and active clients.

nodes.label: Client Data List
nodes.rationale: A detailed table view showing individual client properties such as UUID, Attached inbounds, Traffic usage, Remaining quota, and status toggles for managing each client.

nodes.label: Nodes Management
nodes.rationale: Interface for adding, editing, enabling, and managing distributed nodes in the 3X-UI panel.

nodes.label: Node Health Monitoring
nodes.rationale: Dashboard providing real-time metrics for nodes, including CPU, memory usage, latency, connectivity status, and software versions.

nodes.label: Telegram Bot Setup
nodes.rationale: Demonstrates the initial interaction with BotFather on Telegram to create and manage bots, typically required for setting up 3x-ui Telegram notifications.

nodes.label: Buy Me a Coffee Button Image
